text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's fine. They say there are bumps on every road!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've bumped into many telephone poles from too
much thinking in Bakushin mode, so it's okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Even the greatest experts have their share of bad
luck! I will take this experience as a lesson!
